current_wip.claim_boundary: Code-side diagnostics and rediscovery improvement only. Later captures prove bounded Xiaomi to Samsung Wi-Fi Direct delivery, but not bidirectional delivery, route-bound negative tests or reliability.

release_hard_gate.claim_boundary: The hard gate blocks accidental release-like builds but does not implement production security.

route_benchmark_runner.not_run_reason: The runner now executed on Samsung R5CY22X6MSB and Xiaomi d948ffd0, but the preflight produced zero delivered latency samples and remains insufficient for reliability claims.
route_benchmark_runner.claim_boundary: Repeatable benchmark procedure is ready, but reliability evidence remains open until a two-device N-run capture passes the sample gate.

physical_inline_relay_runner.not_run_reason: Samsung R5CY22X6MSB and Xiaomi d948ffd0 are now both visible in ADB. The remaining blocker is the external physical path: a Mac LAN host reachable from the sender and direct Mac to Android target listener reachability for normal/drop/duplicate/tamper captures.
physical_inline_relay_runner.claim_boundary: Repeatable physical relay procedure is ready, but attack evidence remains open until two-phone before/send/relay/after artifacts prove every claimed mode.

completion_matrix.claim_boundary: Completion-control artifact only; records the required evidence before any 10/10 claim.

single_device_partial_evidence.claim_boundary: Single-device evidence only; does not close peer discovery, route delivery, physical attack or reliability gates.

device_validation.reason: Samsung R5CY22X6MSB and Xiaomi d948ffd0 are visible in ADB. Repeated Xiaomi to Samsung Wi-Fi Direct evidence exists, but bidirectional route delivery, route-bound negative tests, benchmark min-n and physical attack validation remain open.
